title: heterotheca subaxillaris
intro: Heterotheca subaxillaris, also known as Camptopogon or Camptopogon subaxillaris, is a flowering plant species in the daisy family (Asteraceae). This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, which are attributed to its essential oils and flavonoids. The health benefits of Heterotheca subaxillaris include its ability to reduce inflammation, improve respiratory issues, and aid in the management of digestive problems. Heterotheca subaxillaris is often prepared as a tea or infused oil, and it is also used in some herbal remedies for its potential benefits in promoting wound healing and reducing oxidative stress.
